titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَتَطَوَّعُ بِالصِّيَامِ وَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ قَضَاءِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
titles.en: Chapter 43 – The man Fasts voluntariliy, and upon him are the making up for the Fasts from a Month of Ramazan

titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَتَطَوَّعُ بِالصِّيَامِ وَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ قَضَاءِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
titles.en: Chapter 43 – The man Fasts voluntariliy, and upon him are the making up for the Fasts from a Month of Ramazan

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ أَيَّامٌ أَ يَتَطَوَّعُ فَقَالَ لَا حَتَّى يَقْضِيَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ أَيَّامٌ أَ يَتَطَوَّعُ فَقَالَ لَا حَتَّى يَقْضِيَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man upon whom are Fasts from a Month of Ramazan (to make up for), can he Fast optional ones?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, until he makes up for what is upon him from a Month of Ramazan’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man upon whom are Fasts from a Month of Ramazan (to make up for), can he Fast optional ones?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, until he makes up for what is upon him from a Month of Ramazan’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ‘Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from abu al-Sabbah al-Kinaniy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who owes several days of Qada’ (compensatory fast) for the fast of the month of Ramadan if he can fast optional fast. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, he cannot do so before completing Qada’ (compensatory fast) of what is due upon him of the month of Ramadan.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ‘Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from abu al-Sabbah al-Kinaniy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who owes several days of Qada’ (compensatory fast) for the fast of the month of Ramadan if he can fast optional fast. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, he cannot do so before completing Qada’ (compensatory fast) of what is due upon him of the month of Ramadan.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/318)
gradings.label: مجهول
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/318)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي الصَّبَّاحِ الْكِنَانِيِّ قَالَ

titles.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَتَطَوَّعُ بِالصِّيَامِ وَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ قَضَاءِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
titles.en: Chapter 43 – The man Fasts voluntariliy, and upon him are the making up for the Fasts from a Month of Ramazan

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ طَائِفَةٌ أَ يَتَطَوَّعُ فَقَالَ لَا حَتَّى يَقْضِيَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ طَائِفَةٌ أَ يَتَطَوَّعُ فَقَالَ لَا حَتَّى يَقْضِيَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the man upon who are a number of Fasts from a Month of Ramazan, can he Fast optional ones?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, until he makes up for what is upon him from a Month of Ramazan’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the man upon who are a number of Fasts from a Month of Ramazan, can he Fast optional ones?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, until he makes up for what is upon him from a Month of Ramazan’.

segments: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “This is in regards to my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who owes Qada’ (compensatory fast) of the month of Ramadan if he can fast optional fast. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, he cannot do so before he completing Qada’ (compensatory fast) of the month of Ramadan.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “This is in regards to my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who owes Qada’ (compensatory fast) of the month of Ramadan if he can fast optional fast. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, he cannot do so before he completing Qada’ (compensatory fast) of the month of Ramadan.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/318)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/318)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ قَالَ
